refsection.title: Purpose
refsection.para: The goal of this document is to present the designs which are available in this toolbox.

refsection.title: Central Composite
refsection.programlisting: x = scidoe_ccdesign(2) scf(); plot(x(:,1),x(:,2),"bo") xtitle("Central Composite Design","X1","X2")

refsection.title: Box-Benkhen Design
Full Factorial Design
Fractional Factorial Design
Latin Hypercube Sampling Design
refsection.programlisting: H = scidoe_lhsdesign(2,5) scf(); scidoe_plotlhs(H) xtitle("LHS design","X1","X2")

refsection.title: Star Design
refsection.programlisting: H = scidoe_star(2) h = scf(); plot(H(:,1),H(:,2),"bo") scidoe_plotcube(2) xtitle("Star Design","X1","X2","X3")
